sections.title: Common Questions About Our Services
sections.description: Get answers to the most common questions Lakewood businesses ask us.

faqs.question: Do you only work with businesses in Lakewood?
faqs.answer: While we specialize in serving Lakewood businesses, we work with clients throughout the Denver metro area and beyond.

faqs.question: What types of businesses do you work with?
faqs.answer: We work with businesses of all sizes and industries, from local shops and restaurants to professional services and e-commerce stores.

faqs.question: How much do your services cost?
faqs.answer: Every business has different needs and budgets. We offer flexible packages and custom solutions. Contact us for a free consultation and personalized quote.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: We offer both project-based work and ongoing monthly services. Many clients start with a project and then continue with monthly marketing support.

faqs.question: How quickly can you get started?
faqs.answer: We can typically start within 1-2 weeks of our initial consultation, depending on the scope of work and our current schedule.

faqs.question: Will I have a dedicated contact person?
faqs.answer: Yes! You'll work directly with our team and have a main point of contact who knows your business and goals.
